SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase dev project URL (Mumbai) — e.g. https://ufgfznpqixplcbhmsqqw.supabase.co

SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Supabase anon/public key — respects Row Level Security. Found under Project API keys → anon public.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key — bypasses RLS, used only in test teardown. Found under Project API keys → service_role.

SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Supabase CLI personal access token (NOT the anon key). Used to authenticate the Supabase CLI for deployments. Generate at https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens
